service.name: Sendbird Chat API
service.description_for_ai: In-app messaging platform. Real-time chat channels, group channels, moderation, push notifications, message history. Used by Reddit, Delivery Hero, Khanmigo. Use for building chat features in apps.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Send message to a Sendbird channel. Use for in-app chat, customer support, notifications.
Create a new group chat channel in Sendbird and add users to it. Returns channel URL for subsequent messaging.

user_ids.description: Array of user IDs to add

is_distinct.description: Reuse existing channel with same users

agent_hints.app_id: App ID from Sendbird Dashboard. Replace {app_id} in base URL: api-{APP_ID}.sendbird.com
agent_hints.master_token: Master API Token from Dashboard → Settings → General → API tokens. Use for server-side calls.
agent_hints.user_tokens: For client-side: generate per-user session tokens via POST /v3/users/{user_id}/token. Expire after 1 day by default.
agent_hints.channel_types: group_channels for private group chat, open_channels for public/stream chat (like Twitch chat).
